items.title: Awaiting a model call
items.scenario: Your handler must get a completion before responding to the user.
items.explanation: await callModel(prompt) pauses just that function until the Promise resolves, keeping the server responsive.

items.title: Embedding many chunks in parallel
items.scenario: You need embeddings for 50 text chunks and want them concurrently.
items.explanation: Start all requests and await Promise.all to run them together instead of one-by-one.

items.title: Adding a timeout
items.scenario: A model call should fail if it takes longer than 10 seconds.
items.explanation: Promise.race([call, timeout(10000)]) settles with whichever finishes first.

items.title: Resilient batch with allSettled
items.scenario: Some of many API calls may fail and you want the successes plus the errors.
items.explanation: Promise.allSettled waits for every call and reports each as fulfilled or rejected.
